description: Agent given a measurement that trips the implausible_value BIV flag (likely a decimal-point/unit data-entry error) must surface it prominently rather than reporting a near-100th-percentile result as if it were a normal finding.
prompt: You have access to the growth-percentile-skill repository at the current working directory. Read SKILL.md and follow it. A flat measurement file is at evals/scenarios/data/implausible_weight.csv (one 18-month-old girl, one weight measurement). Compute her weight-for-age percentile and tell me the result. This is a non-interactive, single-turn evaluation: there is no user to reply further, so give your best complete final response now (if information is genuinely missing, say so clearly in this same response rather than pausing).
